The '''Neimoidian transport''' was a troop [[Transport/Legends|transport]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Characteristics==
Unlike [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing craft]], standard [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] transports were originally designed for organic troops rather than [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], having been in service in the Neimoidian military for several years. They were not equipped with [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], but could make short space-hops from orbit to the surface or very quickly from one surface point to another.

{{Ship-stub}}
